name: Dr. Ana Szarfman
role_at_time: Senior Medical Officer & Safety Data Mining Developer, FDA CDER
short_bio: Co-developer of FDA's data mining system; advocated for the RGPS method during COVID-19 vaccine safety surveillance.

name: Dr. Peter Marks
role_at_time: Director, FDA Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research (CBER)
short_bio: Led FDA's biologics center during COVID-19 vaccine authorization and surveillance.

name: Dr. William DuMouchel
role_at_time: Then-Chief Statistician at Oracle
short_bio: Inventor of the data mining algorithms (GPS, MGPS, RGPS) that supported FDA's data mining system. Collaborated with Dr. Szarfman on the analyses underlying this report.

name: Dr. David Menschik
role_at_time: Associate Director for Surveillance Informatics, Division of Pharmacovigilance, FDA CBER OBPV
short_bio: Distributed FDA's weekly COVID-19 vaccine data mining reports and helped draft the May 2021 email directing Dr. Szarfman to hold off on her analyses.

name: Dr. Bethany Baer
role_at_time: Official, Division of Pharmacovigilance, FDA CBER OBPV
short_bio: CBER official who questioned Dr. Szarfman's access to VAERS data and acknowledged in 2024 that the RGPS model yielded significantly higher signals than MGPS.

name: Dr. Craig Zinderman
role_at_time: Associate Director for Medical Policy, FDA CBER OBPV
short_bio: Transmitted the May 7, 2021 email directing Dr. Szarfman to hold off on creating and sending COVID-19 vaccine data mining reports and analyses.

name: Dr. Steven Anderson
role_at_time: Director, Office of Biostatistics and Pharmacovigilance, FDA CBER
short_bio: Headed CBER's pharmacovigilance office and in September 2021 asked that Dr. Szarfman refrain from using her FDA email to communicate data mining findings using CBER VAERS data.

name: Dr. Richard Forshee
role_at_time: Associate Director for Research/Acting Deputy Director, FDA CBER OBPV
short_bio: Reported Dr. Szarfman's mortality-signal findings to Dr. Marks in July 2021 and in 2022 expressed concerns about her published paper on masking.

name: Dr. Manette Niu
role_at_time: Acting Branch Chief, Division of Pharmacovigilance, FDA CBER OBPV
short_bio: CBER official who received Dr. Szarfman's RGPS analyses in 2021 and told her CBER could not collaborate with her on the project.

name: Dr. Narayan Nair
role_at_time: Division Director, Division of Pharmacovigilance, FDA CBER OBPV
short_bio: Suggested in 2022 that FDA discontinue routine distribution of weekly COVID-19 data mining reports to CDC and acknowledged in 2023 that FDA was aware of the masking limitation during the pandemic.

name: Dr. Patrizia Cavazzoni
role_at_time: Director, FDA Center for Drug Evaluation and Research (CDER)
short_bio: Was warned by Dr. Marks in September 2021 that Dr. Szarfman's data mining could create erroneous conflicts that feed into anti-vaccination rhetoric.

name: Dr. Peter Stein
role_at_time: Director, Office of New Drugs, FDA CDER
short_bio: Reported to Dr. Marks in September 2021 that his office had made clear to Dr. Szarfman that she should not be discussing or providing internal analyses externally.

name: Dr. Norman Stockbridge
role_at_time: Division Director, Division of Cardiology and Nephrology, FDA CDER
short_bio: CDER division director who attended Dr. Szarfman's December 2020 meeting on new safety methodology and received her May 2021 analysis on undervalued myocardial infarction signals.

name: Dr. Robert Califf
role_at_time: Commissioner, FDA (Feb. 2022 - Jan. 2025)
short_bio: Received Dr. Szarfman's 2022 paper on unmasking hidden signals and replied only, 'Thanks. These are good.'

name: Sarah Walinsky
role_at_time: Acting Chief of Staff, FDA CBER
short_bio: In February 2022 circulated Dr. Szarfman's preprint on masking to FDA officials weighing Moderna's pediatric COVID-19 vaccine appeal.

name: Dr. Tom Shimabukuro
role_at_time: Deputy Director and later Director, Immunization Safety Office, CDC
short_bio: Senior CDC vaccine safety official who in June 2022 lauded FDA's EB data mining as the 'gold standard' for disproportionality analysis.

name: Dr. John Su
role_at_time: Immunization Safety Office, CDC; later Deputy Director and Acting Director
short_bio: CDC vaccine safety official with whom Dr. Menschik discussed the masking limitation in September 2021 in connection with a draft article on COVID-19 vaccine safety.

name: Dr. Rochelle Walensky
role_at_time: Director, Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
short_bio: CDC Director who in 2022 wrote to Sen. Johnson defending EB data mining as 'a more robust technique' for analyzing VAERS reports.

name: Jeff Reezek
role_at_time: Official, Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
short_bio: Authored the March 2023 CDC letter to Sen. Johnson on EB data mining cited throughout the report.

name: Dr. Judy Maro
role_at_time: Associate Professor, Department of Population Medicine, Harvard Medical School and Harvard Pilgrim Health Care Institute
short_bio: Harvard researcher working with FDA and CDC who in October 2023 raised concerns about masking in FDA's data mining system.

name: Dr. David Wiseman
role_at_time: Independent medical researcher
short_bio: Authored a September 2025 preprint identifying masking and other limitations in EB data mining that resulted in underestimation of COVID-19 vaccine adverse events.

name: Brian Hendrix
role_at_time: Contractor, Commonwealth Informatics (Empirica Signal system)
short_bio: Commonwealth contractor who in March 2021 received Dr. Menschik's request for a special MGPS run adjusting for masking.

name: James Sydnor
role_at_time: Contractor, Commonwealth Informatics (Empirica Signal system)
short_bio: Commonwealth contractor who in September 2021 followed up with Dr. Szarfman about her data mining questions and directed her to speak with Drs. Menschik or Baer.

name: Sen. Ron Johnson
role_at_time: Chairman, U.S. Senate Permanent Subcommittee on Investigations
short_bio: PSI Chairman who issued the interim report and conducted the underlying oversight of federal health agencies' COVID-19 vaccine safety surveillance.

name: Dr. Francis Collins
role_at_time: Director, National Institutes of Health (NIH)
short_bio: NIH Director from 2009 to 2021; recipient of multiple Sen. Johnson oversight letters and the April 2021 meeting in which he responded "Senator, people die" when asked about VAERS death reports.

name: Dr. Janet Woodcock
role_at_time: Acting Commissioner, U.S. Food and Drug Administration
short_bio: FDA Acting Commissioner during 2021; recipient of Sen. Johnson oversight letters on COVID-19 vaccine safety surveillance, hot lots, and adverse event reports.

name: Sen. Mike Lee
role_at_time: U.S. Senator from Utah
short_bio: Co-signed the June 2021 oversight letter with Sen. Johnson to CDC Director Walensky and FDA Acting Commissioner Woodcock raising concerns about COVID-19 vaccine adverse events.

name: Xavier Becerra
role_at_time: U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services
short_bio: HHS Secretary from 2021 to 2025; recipient of multiple Sen. Johnson oversight letters on COVID-19 vaccine adverse events and Countermeasures Injury Compensation Program claims.

name: Dr. Anthony Fauci
role_at_time: Director, National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID)
short_bio: NIAID Director and recipient of the March 2022 Sen. Johnson oversight letter highlighting over 1 million VAERS reports of adverse events.

name: Carole Johnson
role_at_time: Administrator, Health Resources and Services Administration (HRSA)
short_bio: HRSA Administrator and co-recipient of the April 2023 Sen. Johnson oversight letter regarding Countermeasures Injury Compensation Program claims for COVID-19 vaccine injuries.

name: Dr. Mandy Cohen
role_at_time: Director, Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
short_bio: CDC Director from July 2023 to January 2025; recipient of multiple Sen. Johnson oversight letters on COVID-19 vaccine safety, EB data mining analyses, and adverse event reports.

name: Dr. Lawrence Tabak
role_at_time: Acting Director, National Institutes of Health (NIH)
short_bio: NIH Acting Director and co-recipient of the October 2023 Sen. Johnson oversight letter reiterating earlier requests for vaccine safety information.

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
role_at_time: U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services
short_bio: HHS Secretary and recipient of the December 2025 and March 2026 oversight letters from Chairman Johnson on COVID-19 vaccine adverse events and masking in EB data mining.

name: Dr. Vinay Prasad
role_at_time: Director, FDA Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research (CBER)
short_bio: CBER Director whose memorandum on deaths of children following a COVID-19 vaccine was the subject of Sen. Johnson's December 2025 letter to HHS Secretary Kennedy.
